campaignGoal: Support the Greenpill NYC Octant vault campaign.
vaultStory: Greenpill NYC uses an Octant vault to let supporters endow a project-aligned vault position rather than make a one-time donation.
impactFraming: Supporters can help sustain local public-goods coordination while retaining a vault-share position that can be managed from the campaign route.
riskNotes: The pilot vault asset is WETH on Ethereum mainnet; primary donor copy may say ETH contribution only with WETH settlement detail.
Factory evidence is creator/strategy-factory metadata, not proven MultistrategyVaultFactory deployment proof.
Live card-funded value movement and positive share proof remain human-gated outside automated validation.

factoryEvidence.name: YearnV3StrategyFactory
factoryEvidence.proofLimit: Creator/strategy-factory evidence only; not a proven MultistrategyVaultFactory accessor return.

campaignCopy: Endow the Greenpill NYC Octant vault with a WETH-settled contribution and review the configured vault, asset, and receiver before authorizing any transaction.
recipientRoutingSummary: Use the project-approved Greenpill NYC routing summary from the target campaign brief before public launch.

validationCommands: target repo unit tests for readiness and transaction shape
target repo browser proof before live value movement

privacy.publicLogPolicy: redact provider sessions, receipt tokens, emails, OTPs, and wallet-specific recovery identifiers

proofLimits: Live card-funded value movement and positive mainnet share proof are not performed by automated validation.
Factory evidence is not create-vault authorization proof.
